chat.presidentstaxcollection.income_dete: §6[The President] §fLook at that... you're already generating income.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.escape_cons: §c[The President] §fNo one escapes death and taxes. Next time will be harder.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.kill_conseq: §c[The President] §fYou beat me this time... but next time will be worse. The State doesn't forget.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.demand_paym: §6[The President] §fYou must pay §e%s diamond(s)§f. You have §c%s seconds§f.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.payment_rec: §a[The President] §fPayment received. For now... until next time.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.not_your_de: §7[The President] §fThis isn't about you... I'll come to collect, don't worry.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.no_more_mon: §c[The President] §fIt's too late to back out now.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.need_diamon: §c[The President] §fYou need §e%s §fdiamond(s) to pay your debt.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt_low: I have a couple of invoices that don't match your income...
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt_medium: It seems to me you forgot to declare some diamonds, didn't you?
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt_high: The IRS personally sent me to retrieve what is ours.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt_critic: Your debt is unpayable. The State doesn't forget.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.none.1: Nice to see you debt-free. Almost makes me feel bad showing up.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.none.3: You're clean today. Enjoy it while it lasts.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.none.4: You owe nothing… that makes me uncomfortable.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.none.5: I don’t see people like you often… no debts at all.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.low.1: It’s small… but not free. Pay up and we’re good.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.low.2: Still manageable. Don’t turn it into a problem.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.low.4: Don’t make me escalate this over a diamond.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.low.5: We can solve this easily… or make it complicated.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.medium: Now you owe me… and I don’t like  myself.
It’s piling up… and so am I.
Don’t play dumb. I know exactly what you owe.
This isn’t as small as you think anymore.
You’re starting to worry me… and that’s bad for you.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.high.1: Someone’s about to lose more than diamonds.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.high.2: This isn’t a joke anymore. Patience is over.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.high.3: Nice house… would be a shame.
chat.presidentstaxcollection.debt.critic: You’re not a debtor anymore… you’re a problem.
You belong to me now. And I will collect.
I gave you chances. Now you get consequences.
Run if you want… I enjoy the chase.
